item.title: LEGO City Express Passenger Train Set Remote Controlled Toy Gifts for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls with Working Headlights 2 Coaches and 24 Track Pieces Plus 6 Minifigures 60337
item.description: You’ve got LEGO City Express Passenger Train Set Remote Controlled Toy Gifts for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls with Working Headlights 2 Coaches and 24 Track Pieces Plus 6 Minifigures 60337 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO train set comes with step-by-step instructions for each model, so kids can learn to build the remote control train with confidence This LEGO city train set features a remote control bullet locomotive train toy with working, dimmable headlights and LEGO Powered Up technology The train and its dimmable lights can be controlled via the included remote control or a smart device equipped with the LEGO Powered Up App Kids can role-play cool scenarios: wait at the platform, board the restaurant car for a toy hotdog or hop on the passenger coach with laptop LEGO City Express toy train set is an exciting birthday gift for kids, boys and girls age 7 plus and any fan of remote control trains and cars Includes 6 LEGO minifigures: 4 passengers, train driver, restaurant worker, plus bike and helmet, wheelchair, briefcase and backpack accessories This train toy for kids includes a train with a restaurant car, passenger coach, station platform, 24 track pieces and 6 minifigures 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet Set The Clone Wars Collectible for Adults 2023 Series Model Collection Memorabilia Gift Idea for Him or Her 75349
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet Set The Clone Wars Collectible for Adults 2023 Series Model Collection Memorabilia Gift Idea for Him or Her 75349 at the following link: ℹ️: Part of a collection of LEGO Star Wars collectible helmets to build and display; includes picture instructions in print and on the LEGO Builder app Proudly display this LEGO Star Wars memorabilia model on the brick-built stand with a nameplate; makes an attention-grabbing décor piece Relive spectacular scenes from Star Wars: The Clone Wars as you replicate authentic details of Captain Rexs helmet in LEGO bricks Number of Pieces: 854 This 854-piece LEGO Star Wars set for adults makes a great gift for any fan, an experienced LEGO builder or a Star Wars LEGO helmet collector Features a highly-detailed LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet model set which allows fans to pay tribute to the 501st Legion Clone Commander 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Marvel I am Groot Buildable Toy Guardians of the Galaxy 2 Set Featuring a Collectable Baby Groot Model Figure Gift Idea for 10 Plus Year Oldn Kids Boys Girls and Avengers Fans 76217
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Marvel I am Groot Buildable Toy Guardians of the Galaxy 2 Set Featuring a Collectable Baby Groot Model Figure Gift Idea for 10 Plus Year Oldn Kids Boys Girls and Avengers Fans 76217 at the following link: ℹ️: With this LEGO Marvel building toy, kids can build a highly posable Baby Groot model figure, from the Marvel Studios Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2, with all its cute features This set is a great Marvel-themed birthday or Christmas gift idea for kids, boys and girls aged 10+ years old who are fans of the Marvel universe and love Avengers buildable toys The set comes with printed instructions, plus kids can use a digital version in the LEGO Building Instructions app to zoom and rotate while building the posable Avengers model The fully jointed Groot buildable toy is easy to position and comes with a pretend cassette to recreate the famous Baby Groot dancing scene Passionate fans can place the cute Marvel character in a pose, can dance with him to the rhythm of the music and recreate his funny movements 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars 75372 Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack incl. 4 Minifigures 5 Droids and a Speeder Bike with Shooters - Building Toys for 7+ Year Old Boys & Girls
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars 75372 Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack incl. 4 Minifigures 5 Droids and a Speeder Bike with Shooters - Building Toys for 7+ Year Old Boys & Girls with a discount here: ℹ️: Buildable LEGO Star Wars toy speeder bike for kids – The speeder bike has 2 stud shooters, 2 holders for blasters and space for 2 Clone Troopers Star Wars vehicles and accessories – Includes a STAP speeder for a Battle Droid, a defensive post with stud shooter and a thermal detonator element Unlimited creative play – This LEGO Star Wars set includes a tri-droid figure with a rotating top and 3 flick shooters, and much more Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack – Recreate Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes with Star Wars figures, minifigures, a speeder bike and more 4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures and 5 figures – A Clone Shock Trooper, 3 Clone Troopers, 3 Super Battle Droids and 2 Battle Droids with accessories 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian s N-1 Starfighter Building Toy The Book of Boba Fett Gift idea for Kids Boys & Girls Age 9 Plus with Baby Yoda and Droid Figures 75325
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian s N-1 Starfighter Building Toy The Book of Boba Fett Gift idea for Kids Boys & Girls Age 9 Plus with Baby Yoda and Droid Figures 75325 at the following link: ℹ️: The LEGO Mandalorian buildable toy features a minifigure cockpit, cargo compartment and a spring loaded shooter to protect the crew With this LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter buildable toy set, youngsters can relive The Book of Boba Fett stories on Tatooine Includes a LEGO The Mandalorian minifigure with jet pack and darksaber accessories, Peli Motto minifigure with a wrench and a BD Droid figure Kids can place the included Baby Yoda LEGO figure in the starfighters passenger space to experience epic The Book of Boba Fett adventures Clear, illustrated building instructions are included so even LEGO beginners can build this LEGO Star Wars building toy with confidence This LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter buildable toy set makes a great gift for 9 plus year old kids, boys and girls 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Iconic Gift Idea for Kids Girls & Boys 43217
item.description: You can find LEGO Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Iconic Gift Idea for Kids Girls & Boys 43217 with a discount here: ℹ️: The Up house model building kit includes a chimney, bedroom, porch and living room with fireplace, plus lots of recognisable film details This LEGO | Disney and Pixar house building set is made for endless play sessions or a colourful, eye-catching display in kids’ (or adults’!

item.title: LEGO Technic McLaren P1 Hypercar Building Set Scale Model Car Kit for Adults to Build Collectible Vehicle with V8 Piston Engine and 7-Speed Gearbox Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42172
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic McLaren P1 Hypercar Building Set Scale Model Car Kit for Adults to Build Collectible Vehicle with V8 Piston Engine and 7-Speed Gearbox Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42172 at the following link: ℹ️: 3D building instructions – Get ready to build like never before with the LEGO Builder app, where you can save sets and track your progress Authentic features– Enjoy assembling details like the 7-speed gearbox with shifter drum, opening doors, adjustable rear wing and V8 piston engine Unique serial number tile – This LEGO Technic model car features its own unique serial number, giving you access to exclusive online content Model kit for adults to build – From the unboxing experience to the building project, this LEGO Technic set delivers a rewarding challenge for fans A car gift for McLaren fans – This LEGO Technic building set for adults makes a great Christmas gift for men and women, including adult LEGO builders and supercar enthusiasts LEGO Technic set for adults – This McLaren P1 building set for adults can be built to make a collectible 1:8 scale model car for supercar fans 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre modular building set features 5 floors, each with different areas for kids to explore The construction toy features a crane to access the side of the building for kids to work on the mural, plus a stage with a dancing function The model building kit includes lots of toy art, a sewing machine, music, gardening and gaming accessories so kids can create their own scenes Includes a music room, recording studio, chill out zone, art studio, pool and greenhouse, plus slide and platform to move from one floor to another Includes LEGO Friends Paisley, Liann, Olly, Nova, Zac mini-dolls and Pickle the dog, plus Stephanie, one of the original characters, who became Heartlake City mayor The modular style of this building toy lets kids arrange the various levels to create their own design, then switch it up whenever they want Expand the fun: This set combines with the LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Kitchen 41747 (sold separately) for even bigger stories 🛒 Check the deal!
